values: Queue tier 1-3 training/screening specs only. Do not leave unattended jobs spending OOS/promote reads.
Train this only after the recipe is frozen. It is the production artifact, not validation evidence.
612 for risk-adjusted behavior; 613 for raw return. Treat both as candidates until seed repeats confirm.
Use shadow trading and audited target weights before any live capital. The repo does not implement broker execution or capacity modeling.
